title: How Trust Score Works
answer: Trusty computes a 0-100 explainable trust score using verification signals: purchase validation, delivery confirmation, behavior consistency, risk-safe device patterns, and anomaly detection. Each review is then labeled as High, Medium, or Low trust with transparent reasons.

title: Submit Feedback
answer: To submit feedback, open the vendor page, select the vendor, and add your review. If you have a feedback code from your order, include it for stronger verification. Verified reviews get richer trust explainability.

title: Privacy & Security
answer: Trusty is privacy-safe by design. We use minimal required data, hashed technical signals, and audit-friendly integrity checks. Sensitive details are never publicly exposed. Verified proofs can be anchored for tamper-resistance.

title: Vendor Contact
answer: You can message a vendor directly from support. Vendors manage these messages in their dashboard and can reply or resolve them. Use this for order clarifications, delivery updates, and service issues.

title: Ticket System
answer: If your issue needs platform support, raise a ticket. Admin reviews, updates status (open, in-progress, resolved), and replies by dashboard workflow. You also receive email updates when admin responds.

title: Support Response Time
answer: Typical response targets: chatbot instantly, vendor messaging within one business day, and admin tickets within 24-48 hours depending on priority. Security/account issues are prioritized.
